narratives.Overview: Additive PlanBuilder API and convenience helpers for libvbrief. Zero new dependencies, full backward compatibility with existing VBriefDocument/Plan/PlanItem constructors.
narratives.FR-1: PlanBuilder class MUST accept plan-level fields (title, status, any optional Plan field) as constructor kwargs and produce a VBriefDocument via to_document().
narratives.FR-2: PlanBuilder MUST support optional use as a context manager. __exit__ is a no-op. Plain object usage (without with) MUST also work.
narratives.FR-3: PlanBuilder.add_item(title, *, id=None, status='pending', **kwargs) MUST add a top-level item and return an ItemBuilder.
narratives.FR-4: PlanBuilder.add_narrative(key, value) MUST add to plan.narratives.
narratives.FR-5: PlanBuilder.add_edges_from(edges) MUST accept iterable of (from_id, to_id, type) tuples and append to plan.edges.
narratives.FR-6: ItemBuilder.add_subitem(title, *, id=None, status='pending', **kwargs) MUST return a new ItemBuilder, enabling unlimited recursive nesting.
narratives.FR-7: ItemBuilder.add_narrative(key, value) MUST add to the item's narrative dict.
narratives.FR-8: ItemBuilder MUST pass all extra kwargs to the underlying PlanItem constructor.
narratives.FR-9: When id is omitted, builder MUST auto-generate a slug from the title. Sub-items use dot notation: {parent_id}.{child_slug}.
narratives.FR-10: PlanBuilder MUST accept strict parameter (default True). strict=True raises ValueError immediately on invalid calls; strict=False defers to validate().
narratives.FR-11: quick_todo(title, items, *, status='running', **kwargs) MUST accept strings or PlanItem objects and return a VBriefDocument. Strings are coerced to PlanItem(title=s, status='pending').
narratives.FR-12: from_items(title, items, *, status='running', **kwargs) MUST accept a list of PlanItem objects (no coercion) and return a VBriefDocument.
narratives.FR-13: PlanItem MUST gain class method factories: pending, running, completed, blocked, cancelled, draft. Each accepts title + same kwargs as PlanItem.__init__.
narratives.FR-14: PlanBuilder, quick_todo, from_items MUST be exported from libvbrief.__init__ and added to __all__.
narratives.NFR-1: No new runtime dependencies. Standard library and existing libvbrief internals only.
narratives.NFR-2: Full backward compatibility. All existing public API unchanged.
narratives.NFR-3: Python 3.10+ only. No syntax or stdlib features above 3.10.
narratives.NFR-4: All new code MUST have pytest coverage matching existing suite standard. Each phase ends only when its tests pass.

narrative.Note: No external dependencies. Can begin immediately.

narrative.Acceptance: Unit tests pass: nesting, slug generation, duplicate ID detection, narrative accumulation, kwargs passthrough.
narrative.Traces: FR-3, FR-6, FR-7, FR-8, FR-9, FR-10
narrative.Details: ItemBuilder.__init__(title, *, id, status, strict, id_registry, parent_id, **kwargs). Auto-slugify id when None, using parent_id for dot notation. Register id in shared id_registry; raise ValueError on duplicate when strict=True. Implement add_subitem(), add_narrative(), to_planitem() (recursive).

narrative.Acceptance: All test cases pass: 3+ level nesting, slug override, dot notation, narrative accumulation, kwargs round-trip, strict/non-strict duplicate ID.
Full round-trip: build → to_document() → validate(dag=True) returns valid report.
narrative.Traces: FR-1, FR-2, FR-3, FR-4, FR-5, FR-10
narrative.Details: PlanBuilder(title, *, status='draft', strict=True, **kwargs). Implement add_item(), add_narrative(), add_edges_from() (verifies IDs when strict=True), to_document(), __enter__(), __exit__() (no-op).

narrative.Acceptance: All cases pass: CM vs plain object, narratives, edges (valid + invalid with strict), to_document() validity, strict=False deferral, JSON round-trip.

narrative.Note: 2.1 has no dependencies and can run in parallel with Phase 1. 2.2 depends on Phase 1.

subItems.title: Add PlanItem class method factories to models.py

narrative.Acceptance: PlanItem.pending('Fix bug', id='fix', priority='high') produces correctly populated PlanItem with status='pending'.
narrative.Details: pending, running, completed, blocked, cancelled, draft. Each delegates to cls(title=title, status='<value>', **kwargs).

narrative.Acceptance: Each factory sets correct status; all PlanItem kwargs pass through.
Returns valid VBriefDocument; strings coerced to pending PlanItems.
Returns valid VBriefDocument; PlanItem objects used as-is, not mutated.
quick_todo with strings, mixed list, empty list; from_items with PlanItems; both validate().is_valid == True.

subItems.title: Export PlanBuilder, quick_todo, from_items from libvbrief/__init__.py

narrative.Acceptance: from libvbrief import PlanBuilder, quick_todo, from_items works without error.
Full round-trip PlanBuilder→validate(dag=True)→dumps→loads→from_dict field equality. Builder + direct PlanItem mixed. quick_todo file I/O round-trip.

subItems.title: Run full test suite and verify no regressions

narrative.Acceptance: task test (or pytest tests/) exits 0. All pre-existing tests still pass alongside new tests.
